label: 3621 Tribal justice systems

children.heading: Office
children.label: a Office
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out sections 3611 and 3612 of this title, $7,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2011 through 2015. None of the funds provided under this subsection may be used for the administrative expenses of the Office.

children.heading: Base support funding for tribal justice systems
children.label: b Base support funding for tribal justice systems
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out , $50,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2011 through 2015.section 3613 of this title

children.heading: Administrative expenses for Office
children.label: c Administrative expenses for Office
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated, for the administrative expenses of the Office, $500,000 for each of fiscal years 2011 through 2015.

children.heading: Administrative expenses for tribal judicial conferences
children.label: d Administrative expenses for tribal judicial conferences
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated, for the administrative expenses of tribal judicial conferences, $500,000 for each of fiscal years 2011 through 2015.

children.heading: Survey
children.label: e Survey
children.text: For carrying out the survey under , there is authorized to be appropriated, in addition to the amount authorized under subsection (a) of this section, $400,000.section 3612 of this title

children.heading: Indian priority system
children.label: f Indian priority system
children.text: Funds appropriated pursuant to the authorizations provided by this section and available for a tribal justice system shall not be subject to the Indian priority system. Nothing in this chapter shall preclude a tribal government from supplementing any funds received under this chapter with funds received from any other source including the Bureau or any other Federal agency.

children.heading: Allocation of funds
children.label: g Allocation of funds
children.text: In allocating funds appropriated pursuant to the authorization contained in subsection (a) among the Bureau, Office, tribal governments and Courts of Indian Offenses, the Secretary shall take such actions as may be necessary to ensure that such allocation is carried out in a manner that is fair and equitable to all tribal governments and is proportionate to base support funding under received by the Bureau, Office, tribal governments, and Courts of Indian Offenses.section 3613 of this title

children.heading: No offset
children.label: h No offset
children.text: No Federal agency shall offset funds made available pursuant to this chapter for tribal justice systems against other funds otherwise available for use in connection with tribal justice systems.
